channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: There’s suddenly tons of Nvidia RTX 5090 GPU stock on the shelves of one US retailer – probably because no one wants to buy at nearly double the launch price
item.description: The Asus ROG Astral LC RTX 5090 OC Edition has a ridiculously long name, but it’s not as ridiculous as the price this GPU now commands (or rather, fails to command).
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Airtel connects India with 100Tbps submarine cable
item.description: In a significant development for digital infrastructure in India, Bharti Airtel has landed the 2Africa Pearls submarine cable, delivering 100 Terabits per second of international network capacity for the country. The submarine cable will connect to Airtel’s cable landing station (CLS) in Mumbai.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream is a sequel to my favorite 3DS game, and I think it's already packing the charm that inZOI lacks
item.description: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream doesn't need inZOI's impressive visual fidelity to be the better game - here's why.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Nueve tendencias de CRM para 2025: la IA redefine la ecuación del cliente
item.description: La inteligencia artificial (IA) tiene el potencial de transformar todos los aspectos de una empresa, pero sobre todo la gestión de las relaciones con los clientes (CRM), las funciones comerciales de cara al exterior de ventas, marketing y servicio al cliente.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: G2 Names INE 2025 Cybersecurity Training Leader
item.description: INE, a global leader in networking and cybersecurity training and certifications, is proud to announce it is the recipient of twelve badges in G2’s Spring 2025 Report, including Grid Leader for Cybersecurity Professional Development, Online Course Providers, and Technical Skills Development, which h
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: New Australia CIO appointments
item.description: Congratulations to these ‘movers and shakers’ recently hired or promoted into a new chief information officer, senior IT, or board role in Australia. February and March 2025 appointments John Granger joins Healthscope Healthscope has appointed John Granger as Chief Information Officer.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: An AI pioneer is launching a blockchain-powered marketplace for open-source models and applications
item.description: Welcome to AI Decoded, Fast Company’s weekly newsletter that breaks down the most important news in the world of AI. You can sign up to receive this newsletter every week here.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: As big tech circles, UK government struggles to reap promised AI benefits
item.description: The UK government’s grand plan for AI in the public sector is struggling in the face of growing technological challenges, a report by the Parliamentary Public Accounts Committee (PAC), a bipartisan group of elected members of parliament, has found.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Earth’s storage of water in soil, lakes and rivers is dwindling. And it’s especially bad for farming
item.description: New research finds that global warming has significantly reduced the amount of water that’s being stored around the world in soil, lakes, rivers, snow and other places on land.
item.dc:creator: Melina Walling, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department said this week it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: The governing body of figure skating has embarked on an ambitious plan called “Vision 2030,” and the idea is simple: Make the sport cool again.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Nintendo reveals the new Virtual Game Card feature, an easier way to manage your digital Switch games
item.description: Nintendo has announced a new Switch feature called the Virtual Game Card, making it easier to lend out digital games.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Preserve loved ones' voicemails on iPhone
item.description: Saving the voices of loved ones can be a comforting way to keep alive memories. Kurt "the CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to preserve voicemail messages.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Microsoft lauds Hyperlight Wasm for WebAssembly workloads
item.description: Microsoft has unveiled Hyperlight Wasm, a virtual machine “micro-guest” that can run WebAssembly component workloads written in a multitude of languages including C and Python. Introduced March 26, Hyperlight Wasm serves as a Rust library crate.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Misinformation expert encouraged picket lines at Tesla sites to protest DOGE cuts. Then came the online threats
item.description: (CNN) — Sociologist Joan Donovan rarely looks at social media posts about herself on X anymore. She already knows what’s being said.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Cyprus to fund desalination plants at hotels to reduce impact of water shortages on tourism
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Cyprus said Wednesday it plans to subsidize construction of private desalination plants at hotels to ensure the tourism-reliant island nation has enough fresh water too see it through busy summer seasons when the demands of millions of visitors put a severe strain on dwindling
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Striking the balance between information sharing and security
item.description: That balancing act requires a complex response, especially when designing networks and systems for collaboration. The post Striking the balance between information sharing and security first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Napster sold to tech commerce company for $207 million
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A brand that was notoriously connected to music piracy before reemerging as a subscription music service has been sold to Infinite Reality for $207 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 5 big takeaways from Nvidia GTC
item.description: Now that the dust has settled from Nvidia’s GTC 2025, a few industry experts weighed in on some core big picture developments from the conference.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Waymo plans to bring its driverless taxis to Washington in 2026
item.description: Waymo on Tuesday added Washington to its pioneering robotaxi service's steadily expanding list of U.S. markets, although passengers will have to wait until next year until they can take a driverless ride around the nation's capital city.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Nvidia: Latest news and insights
item.description: Coverage of Nvidia GTC 2025 With its legacy of innovation in GPU technology, Nvidia has become a dominant force in the AI market. Nvidia’s partners read like a technology who’s who list – e.g.
item.dc:creator: Network World
